approved_companies.name: NVIDIA CORP
approved_companies.rationale: NVIDIA is a leading semiconductor company heavily engaged in GPU technology where TSMC is a key manufacturing partner.

approved_companies.name: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES INC
approved_companies.rationale: AMD is a prominent semiconductor manufacturer that relies on TSMC for chip fabrication.

approved_companies.name: QUALCOMM INC/DE
approved_companies.rationale: QUALCOMM is a leading designer of semiconductors and relies on external fabrication services, often including TSMC.

approved_companies.name: Broadcom Inc.
approved_companies.rationale: Broadcom, as a major player in semiconductors, utilizes TSMC for some of its manufacturing needs.

approved_companies.name: INTEL CORP
approved_companies.rationale: Intel is a major competitor in semiconductor manufacturing but also collaborates with TSMC in specific segments, particularly for advanced nodes.

approved_companies.name: TEXAS INSTRUMENTS INC
approved_companies.rationale: Texas Instruments, while having its own fabrication capabilities, still engages with TSMC for certain manufacturing processes.
